SEARCH
Package sc.fiji.snt.gui.cmds

Class MultiSpectralRefinerCmd

java.lang.Object
org.scijava.AbstractContextual
org.scijava.command.ContextCommand
sc.fiji.snt.gui.cmds.MultiSpectralRefinerCmd
All Implemented Interfaces:
Runnable, org.scijava.Cancelable, org.scijava.command.Command, org.scijava.Contextual, org.scijava.plugin.SciJavaPlugin
public class MultiSpectralRefinerCmd extends org.scijava.command.ContextCommand
GUI command for MultiSpectralRefiner. Configures cost function weights, thresholds, and parallelization settings for post-hoc refinement of traced paths in multispectral (Brainbow) images.
Author:
Tiago Ferreira
See Also:
  • MultiSpectralRefiner
  • PathFitterCmd
